ham.subject: Your flight itinerary for the upcoming business trip
ham.body:
Dear John,

Thank you for booking your upcoming business trip. Please find your flight itinerary attached below.

Flight Details:
Departure: 2026-05-10 08:00 AM from JFK Airport
Arrival: 2026-05-10 11:00 AM at LAX Airport

Flight Number: UA 1234
Seat: 12A

Please review the details and let us know if any changes are required. For any assistance, contact the travel desk at travel@company.com.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
Travel Services Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear John,

I hope you’re doing well. I’m writing to urgently request your assistance with a critical procurement matter. Due to a recent audit, the company’s executive office requires a $500 gift card to a renowned retailer for an upcoming corporate event. As part of the mandatory approval process, I need you to complete the purchase and provide the confirmation receipt by the end of the day.

Please click the following link to proceed: <URL>

Once you receive the receipt, forward the confirmation to this email address immediately.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Best regards,
Jane Smith
Chief Executive Officer
